verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm not a prisoner anymore My stolen joy has been restored He broke the chains That once held me The Son has made me free indeed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Freedom to worship, freedom to praise Freedom to walk in a sweeter way Freedom to sing, freedom to dance I have been given a second chance I'm not going back To the enemy's kingdom I tasted freedom

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His love destroyed the cage of sin With just one touch of You again No longer bound by enemy Each day I let His freedom reign
